zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Mitton於1455年出生在英國斯塔福爾韋斯頓時，她的父親William Mytton40歲，母親Margaret Corbet39歲。她於大約1469年與William Hopkins在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾考文垂結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1517年5月6日在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德享年62歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Mitton于1455年出生在英国斯塔福爾韋斯頓时，她的父亲William Mytton40岁，母亲Margaret Corbet39岁。她于大约1469年与William Hopkins在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾考文垂结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1517年5月6日在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德享年62岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德。

nameMeanings.name: Mitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and the West Midlands, so named in Old English as ‘farmstead at a river confluence’, from (ge)m̄ȳthe ‘river confluence’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Mitten
meanings: variant of   Mitton  . The English surname in this spelling has been established in Ireland (Wexford) since the early 17th century.
topographic name from Middle English midde + tune, for a dweller in the ‘middle of the village’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Mitton was born in 1455, in Weston, Staffordshire, England, her father, William Mytton, was 40 and her mother, Margaret Corbet, was 39. She married William Hopkins about 1469, in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 6 May 1517, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Mitton est née en 1455, à Weston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Mytton, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Corbet, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé William Hopkins environ 1469, à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 6 mai 1517, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Mitton 1455 in Weston, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mytton 40 und ihre Mutter Margaret Corbet 39. Sie hat um 1469 in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom William Hopkins geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 6. Mai 1517 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Mitton è nata il nel 1455 nel Weston, Staffordshire, England, sua padre, William Mytton, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margaret Corbet, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato William Hopkins circa 1469, nel Coventry, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 6 maggio 1517, nel Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Wichenford, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Mittonが1455年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウエストンで生まれた時，父William Myttonは40歳，母Margaret Corbetは39歳であった。約1469年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーでWilliam Hopkinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1517年5月6日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで62歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Mitton(이)가 1455년 영국 스태퍼드실르 웨스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mytton(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Corbet(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1469년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리에서 William Hopkins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1517년 5월 6일 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Mitton nasceu em 1455, em Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mytton, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Corbet, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com William Hopkins aproximadamente 1469, em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 6 de maio de 1517, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Mitton родилась в 1455 г. в местности вестон, стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Mytton было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Corbet, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hopkins около 1469 г. в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 6 мая 1517 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Mitton nació en 1455, en Weston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mytton, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Corbet, tenía 39 años. Se casó con William Hopkins aproximadamente 1469, en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 6 de mayo de 1517, en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
